creator: peter@flytrace.com
text:
I've just fixed a pkg-plist of x11-wm/enlightenment to use variables (so it should work on different architectures). I'll add a diff of the current work here.

As about static pkg-plist for EFL, any help will be appreciated.

But, IMHO, using the static pkg-plist for EFL will make the work of maintaining the port up-to-date really hard. Probably, some additional options (wayland-related) will come soon. So, for every update of the port many tests with different build options will be necessary. As for me, I don't see any interest there. Many 'heavy' ports use dynamic pkg-plist.
